title: GulliverLite
description: GulliverLite adds some of the features from the old Gulliver Mod back into 1.20.1. It is a current WIP that will have more additions to fully integrate into normal gameplay.
body:
# 🪶 **GulliverLite**

Tiny adventures, big vibes. **GulliverLite** lets you shrink, glide with paper parachutes, raft across water on a lilypad, carry and throw mobs *and other players*, hide inside flowers, ride rockets into the sky, and even retreat into your own personal hidey hole.  
Built for **Fabric**, and integrates seamlessly with **Pehkui** for size scaling.

---

## 🧩 Requirements
- Minecraft **1.20.1**  
- **Fabric Loader** + **Fabric API**  
- **Pehkui** 3.8+

---

## 🧰 Features

### 🧍 **Size Device**
A handheld gadget that lets you set your player’s size to specific tiers — works perfectly alongside Pehkui.

**Crafting Recipe:**  
![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c55a8b81a369258d22230dcd58ead88f7b98bbe4.png)

---

### ☁️ **Paper Parachute**
Hold **Paper** in either hand while falling **smaller than normal size** to gently glide down.

- Prevents fall damage  
- Automatically disables when landing *(planned)*  

---

### 🪷 **Lilypad Raft**
Shrink yourself and right-click a **Lily Pad** on **calm water** with **air above** to spawn a tiny invisible boat with a lilypad top — your **mini raft**!

**Usage:**
- Consumes one Lily Pad (unless in Creative)  
- Controls: W/A/S/D like a boat  
- Despawns and drops the lilypad when not used  

**Tips:**
- Works only when **smaller than normal**  
- Must click the **top face of water** with **air above**

---

### 🐦 **Bird & Bat Riding (Parrots, Chickens, Bats)**
When you’re **Tiny or Micro** (≤ 1/8 scale), you can **ride** a Parrot, Chicken, or **Bat** to soar through the skies!

**Controls:**
- **W** – Move forward  
- **Space** – Ascend gently  
- **Sprint (Ctrl)** – Descend slowly  
- Hover naturally when idle  
- Auto-ejects if you grow too large  

**Notes:**
- Parrots and Bats can fully fly  
- Chickens glide instead of flying  
- Mounts are AI-disabled while ridden for smooth control  

---

### ✋ **Player & Mob Carrying**
When you’re **larger than normal**, you can **pick up mobs and even other players**!

**How it works:**
- **Right-click** a mob or player with an empty hand (while big) to pick them up  
- **Left-click** to throw them forward or upward  
- **Shift + Right-click** to gently place them down  

**Details:**
- Carried entities freeze and can’t move or push you  
- Throws apply forward and upward velocity  
- Fully multiplayer-safe  

---

### 💥 **Giant Stomp (Ground Slam)**
When you’re **giant-sized**, you can **slam the ground** to crush and knock back enemies around you.

**How to use:**
1. Jump into the air while large  
2. Hold **Sneak (Shift)** while falling  
3. Upon landing, unleash a **shockwave** that deals area damage and knockback  

**Effects:**
- Scales with size and fall distance  
- Adds explosion sounds and particles  
- Has a short cooldown  
- Ignores carried entities  

---

### 🌸 **Flower Hiding**
When you’re **smaller than normal**, you can **Right-click a flower** to hide inside it — becoming **invisible** to everyone outside.

**Usage:**
- Works on most flower types  
- **Hold Sneak (Shift)** to dismount and exit  
- Perfect for sneaky escapes or hide-and-seek fun  

---

### 🚀 **Rocket Riding**
Players who are **Tiny or Micro (≤ 1/8 scale)** can now **ride rockets** to soar upward!

**Usage:**
- Place a **firework rocket** to mount it automatically  
- **Sneak** to dismount mid-flight, or wait for auto-eject when it ends  
- Combine with **Elytra** for creative flight tricks  

---

### 🧿 **Hidey Hole & Hidey Wand**
Create your own tiny world within a block! Craft the **Hidey Wand** and use it to enter your **hidey hole**.

**How it works:**
- Small, Tiny, and Micro players (≤ 0.5 scale) can **Right-click** the side of a block with the Hidey Wand to create the hidey hole  
- **Right-click** the hidey hole to enter  
- Inside, stand on the **iron pressure pad** for at least **0.5 seconds**, then **Jump** to exit  
- You can **move the pressure pad** to choose your exit location  
- **Double-sneak (Sneak twice quickly)** to exit without the pad  
- Hidey holes are **persistent**, keeping interiors when re-entered, removed, and replaced 

---

### ⚙️ **Admin / Utility**
- **Reset Size Command** – Instantly reset any player’s scale back to `1.0`  
- **Gulliver Guide Command** – Gives the in-game guidebook with all GulliverLite info and tips  

---

### ☁️ **Safety & Smoothing**
- Automatically enforces valid size tiers (no in-betweens)  
- Prevents stuck gravity or floating states  
- Tiny players take reduced fall damage  
- Carried entities are collision-free  

---

## 🚀 **Quick Start**
1. **Craft** the Size Device  
2. **Shrink or grow** using it  
3. **Glide** with paper while falling  
4. **Raft** across water on a lilypad  
5. **Ride** birds, bats, and chickens when small  
6. **Pick up** mobs or players when big  
7. **Hide** inside flowers or **create a hidey hole**  
8. **Stomp** as a giant for shockwave attacks  

---

## 🔧 **Compatibility**
- Works **standalone**  
- Detects and integrates with **Pehkui**  
- Fully **multiplayer-safe** (client + server install)  

---

## 🌐 **Language Support**
GulliverLite now includes **full localization** for:
- 🇺🇸 English  
- 🇩🇪 German  
- 🇪🇸 Spanish  
- 🇫🇷 French  
- 🇯🇵 Japanese  
- 🇰🇷 Korean  
- 🇧🇷 Portuguese (BR)  
- 🇷🇺 Russian  
- 🇨🇳 Chinese  

---

## 🧩 **Troubleshooting**

| Issue | Likely Cause |
|--------|---------------|
| Lilypad doesn’t place | You’re full-sized, clicked the wrong side, or there’s no air above the water |
| Bird/Bat won’t move | You’re not small enough (must be Tiny/Micro) |
| Paper parachute not working | Must be holding Paper and be smaller than normal |
| Carry not working | You’re too small or not using an empty hand |
| Flower hiding not triggering | Must be smaller than normal and clicking the flower block |
| Hidey hole won’t open | Must be using the Hidey Charm and be ≤ 0.5 scale |

---

## 💬 **Credits**
Developed by **Casual Horizons**  
Fabric mod for **Minecraft 1.20.1**

> *Shrink, soar, stomp, and hide — experience the world at every scale with GulliverLite.*
